点我不明白，第一章男主看到女主跟那个黑色的奔驰车主一起上了后座，等女儿放学之后，女主下了车领着女儿走了之后黑色的奔驰车主也下来，然后坐到了驾驶座位，第15章女主却说她跟她的女同学在一起上了后车座，男主却说他不知道怎么反驳，他释然了，这一环节不知道是男主忘了还是坐着让他忘了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730173931,"group_id":"6902125398406990856","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+vN/xxb63THrl84NJUAA8A=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"50384709354","user_name":"用户名825150"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"50384709354","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{\"icon_default_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf\",\"icon_dark_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8\",\"icon_width\":26,\"icon_height\":16}","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"svip\",\"title_id\":\"svip\",\"icon_type\":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6902125398406990856","book_info":{"abstract":"我有一个幸福的家庭，从那一天开始，不复存在……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/7d48c63c70d10c3e621991564877294c","author":"蛋似钢打","author_id":"","book_id":"6902125398406990856","book_name":"妻子的谎言","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#584040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3897人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":261,\"name\":\"都市日常\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261\u0026name=都市日常\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市
